creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #6)

This one is on me as I forgot to remove the commit from my batch when I pushed, despite me knowing that it is defective.  I have asked the maintainer whether he would like me to roll back the upgrade, but he declined.

Unfortunately I am not good enough at C++ to know how to fix this one.
If someone else knows what the right solution is, do not hesitate to supply a patch.  Worst case we can still roll back to the last good version.
